scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/renderer-dom build && pnpm --filter @pretable/core build && tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/renderer-dom build && pnpm --filter @pretable/core build && vitest run --environment jsdom
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/renderer-dom build && pnpm --filter @pretable/core build && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
